title: EY India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: EY India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
EY India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Rajkot. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About EY India:
EY India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EY India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
